mappings.notes: NS31A EbreakDebug maps to ebrk_insn_i when entering debug mode. Dpc update is captured by debug_mode_entering_o. The PC of the ebreak instruction is pc_id_i.

DebugStepExe maps to debug_single_step_i. JumpRequest maps to jump_set_i. Branch taken maps to branch_set_i && instr_bp_taken_i. For non-flow-changing instructions, PC+4 is approximated by pc_id_i + 4.

EnterDebugMode maps to debug_mode_entering_o. PrivMode maps directly to priv_mode_i. Dcsr privilege field is not directly observable, but the property checks that the privilege mode is captured at entry.
DebugMode maps to debug_mode_o. WriteEn_dcsr is not directly observable, but csr_save_wb_o indicates a CSR write in writeback. The property checks that debug CSR writes only occur in debug mode.
